item.title: Lamborghini Murciélago Pursuit
item.description: New Ryuji car conversion from NFS4- using TheMeandMe's Murciélago as a base- first new conversion using Blender. Keeps params mostly intact, barring changes necessary for prm2hul and a few minor offsetting improvements. Wheels by scloink, like the original model.

item.title: Toyota bB
item.description: Was xB, renamed for accuracy to original model. Mesh was re-converted and repaired from Ryuji's bad mirroring job. Comes with all sorts of colors and a param set derived from the ZZII, but FWD and slower.

item.title: Blitz ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new HUL generated.

item.title: Tommy Kaira ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new HUL generated, utilizes ZZII Professional parameters.
